candidate_handling_policy: These records are retained as candidates only. They must not be merged into active GeoJSON until official detail pages, procurement/contractor records, budget, schedule, deduplication keys, and GeoJSON line or station geometry are checked against public sources.
quality_findings: Homepage, category page, source page, active GeoJSON, and latest batch index remain free of public internal accumulation targets.
Candidate additions focus on currently relevant metro/transport projects but are kept out of active because public-source completion is still required.
Homepage preload cache key is still older than the active data fetch key; this remains a safe future edit target because the runtime fetch already uses the newer key.
